response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, making them overqualified and poorly aligned with the job's core requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: Only basic German proficiency — fails critical language requirement
No demonstrable Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level roles and extensive experience make candidate overqualified for entry-level position
